title: Period / half / quarter / inning market types + SGO provider aliases

live_db_evidence.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_types WHERE id ~ '^(1h|2h|1q|2q|3q|4q|f3|f5|f7|1p)_' returned 30
live_db_evidence.description: Migration applied via Supabase MCP apply_migration. 30 new market_type rows, 33 availability rows (18 NBA + 12 MLB + 3 NHL), 35 SGO aliases covering halves, quarters, and first-N-innings markets.

runtime_change_note: Pure data migration — no code changed. Adds catalog rows so period markets appear in the smart-form market-family picker. No lifecycle, submission, or delivery paths touched.
